goalOutput.goal: load into survival, get a wooden axe and mine a full tree with it

trace.rationale: `open-singleplayer` is the only eligible candidate. It matches the current goal to enter singleplayer, and no safety or prerequisite condition blocks this navigation step.

`open-create-world` is the only eligible candidate. The fresh state shows the world list screen with no playable world selected, so creating a new world is the valid next navigation step toward survival.
`open-world-options` is the only eligible candidate. The fresh state is already on the world creation flow, so opening the world tab is a valid navigation step and does not bypass any precondition.
`focus-world-seed` is eligible on the current Create World screen. It stays within the active world-creation flow and does not bypass any precondition, so it is a valid next navigation step.
`insert-world-seed` is eligible on the current Create World screen because the seed field is focused and the fresh state shows it is the next valid step within the active world-creation flow.

`create-world` is the only available eligible candidate. The fresh state is already on the Create New World screen, and selecting it is the remaining valid progression step in the world-creation flow.

`gather-resource` is the only eligible candidate. The fresh state is already in the world-loading flow for a survival goal, and this action matches the next valid typed survival step without bypassing any precondition.

`craft-axe` is eligible because `steps.gather-resource.checkpointComplete` is true in the fresh state. The survival resource-gathering checkpoint is complete, so crafting the wooden axe is the next valid step toward mining the full tree with it.
bounded retry for transient action failure

`craft-axe` is eligible because `steps.gather-resource.checkpointComplete` is true in the fresh state. The survival resource-gathering checkpoint is complete, so crafting the wooden axe is the next valid step toward mining the full tree with it.
recovery budget exhausted or no declared alternative exists

lastRealtimeSelection.rationale: `craft-axe` is eligible because `steps.gather-resource.checkpointComplete` is true in the fresh state. The survival resource-gathering checkpoint is complete, so crafting the wooden axe is the next valid step toward mining the full tree with it.

lastRecovery.rationale: recovery budget exhausted or no declared alternative exists

goalOutput.goal: load into survival, get a wooden axe and mine a full tree with it

trace.rationale: Eligible preconditions are satisfied. Opening Singleplayer is the required first step toward loading into survival before tool acquisition and tree mining.
Eligible preconditions are satisfied. The next required step is to create a new world so the run can enter survival and continue toward a wooden axe and tree mining.
Eligible preconditions are satisfied. Opening the World tab is the required next step to continue world setup toward survival.
Eligible preconditions are satisfied. Focus the world seed field next so the world setup can continue toward survival.
Eligible preconditions are satisfied. The world seed field is already focused, so inserting the seed next continues world setup toward survival.
Eligible preconditions are satisfied. The seed has already been inserted, so creating the new world is the next required step to enter survival and continue toward a wooden axe and tree mining.
Eligible preconditions are satisfied. The new world is now loading, so the next valid step is to gather resources toward a wooden axe and tree mining.
Eligible preconditions are satisfied. The resource-gather step is the only valid next action now that the world is loaded and the checkpoint is complete.

Eligible preconditions are satisfied. The resource-gather step remains the only valid next action now that the world is loaded and the checkpoint is complete.
